property_description: 3BR/2BA single-family ranch, 1,450 sq ft, built 1978, updated kitchen (2021), original bathrooms, hardwood floors throughout, attached 2-car garage, 0.28-acre lot, central HVAC replaced 2019
2BR/1BA condo, 850 sq ft, 5th floor with elevator, built 2008, in-unit washer/dryer, one assigned parking space, HOA $425/month includes water and gym, building has 120 units

4BR/3.5BA Colonial, 3,200 sq ft, built 1995, finished basement, in-ground pool, premium school district (Blue Ribbon elementary), cul-de-sac lot 0.45 acres, two-story foyer, recently renovated primary suite

Commercial retail space, 2,800 sq ft, ground floor corner unit in mixed-use building, 14-ft ceilings, ADA compliant, NNN lease at $32/sq ft, current tenant (cafe) with 2 years remaining on 5-year lease
Studio apartment, 480 sq ft, 12th floor, doorman building, built 2018, floor-to-ceiling windows, city views, building amenities include rooftop deck and fitness center, pet-friendly

Listing describes property as 'perfect for young professional couples' in a 'vibrant, youthful neighborhood' with 'close proximity to nightlife and trendy restaurants.' No mention of nearby schools, parks, or family amenities despite being in a family-friendly area.
5BR/4BA luxury estate on 2.3 acres, 5,800 sq ft, built 2012, chef kitchen with Sub-Zero/Wolf appliances, home theater, wine cellar, 3-car garage with EV charging, solar panel array, gated community
Vacant lot, 1.2 acres, zoned R-2 residential, gentle slope, public water and sewer available at street, no wetlands per Phase I environmental, approved preliminary plat for 4 townhome units
Duplex, each unit 2BR/1BA (900 sq ft per unit), built 1962, separate utilities, both units currently rented ($1,350/month each), long-term tenants, new roof 2023, off-street parking for 4 vehicles

Agent notes in MLS remarks: 'Property is in a quiet neighborhood with residents who share similar traditional values. Church community nearby. Not suitable for large group housing or Section 8.' These remarks raise discriminatory steering and source-of-income discrimination concerns.

Industrial warehouse, 15,000 sq ft clear span, 24-ft ceiling height, 3 dock-high loading doors, 1 grade-level door, 400-amp 3-phase electrical, heavy-duty concrete floor, 0.8-acre fenced yard, zoned M-1 light industrial
